Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 103 

IMGRTN_STUS_CD 

LABEL: Immigration Status Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: The immigration status of the beneficiary; most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: IMGRTN_STUS_CD 

LONG NAME: IMGRTN_STUS_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0 = U.S. citizen or U.S. national
